goal: Add a side-effect-free patch preflight for the BPK-057 runtime mount implementation plan, validating planned files, route, env gate, reviewer, and execution-closed status without changing server, routes, packages, workflows, deployment, or calling runtime dependencies.
scope_out: Do not mount routes, call orchestrator, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, write files, deploy, change workflows, change packages, or enable execution.
claims: Runtime mount patch can be preflighted without changing files.
Ready BPK-057 plan, planned files, route, env gate, reviewer ref, and execution-closed gate are required.
assumptions: A later implementation task would need a new lock.
dod: Ready, unplanned file, and execution-open cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Route mount, execution, orchestrator, provider, DB, GitHub, write, deployment, package, or workflow changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-057 planned runtime mount implementation without changing files.
